parameters.content: ## Error Budget DB Smoke Test\n\nRuns a simple DB write/read smoke test against `public.error_budget_daily` using credential `N8N database access`.

parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.error_budget_daily (
  cluster TEXT NOT NULL,
  day DATE NOT NULL,
  value_minutes NUMERIC NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  PRIMARY KEY (cluster, day)
);

WITH upsert AS (
  INSERT INTO public.error_budget_daily (cluster, day, value_minutes)
  VALUES ('smoke-test', current_date, 999.99)
  ON CONFLICT (cluster, day)
  DO UPDATE SET value_minutes = EXCLUDED.value_minutes, updated_at = now()
  RETURNING cluster, day, value_minutes, updated_at
)
SELECT
  current_database() AS db,
  current_user AS usr,
  COALESCE(inet_server_addr()::text, 'local-socket') AS host,
  inet_server_port() AS port,
  current_schema() AS schema,
  current_setting('search_path') AS search_path,
  u.cluster,
  u.day,
  u.value_minutes,
  u.updated_at,
  (SELECT count(*)::int FROM public.error_budget_daily WHERE day = current_date) AS rows_today_total,
  (SELECT count(*)::int FROM public.error_budget_daily) AS rows_all_time
FROM upsert u;
SELECT cluster, day, value_minutes, updated_at FROM public.error_budget_daily ORDER BY day DESC, cluster LIMIT 20;
